parameters.query:
INSERT INTO n8n_eventos (id, name, city, airport, start_date, end_date, flight_date, origin, active, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.name }}',
  '{{ $json.city }}',
  '{{ $json.airport }}',
  '{{ $json.start_date }}'::date,
  '{{ $json.end_date }}'::date,
  '{{ $json.flight_date }}'::date,
  '{{ $json.origin }}',
  true,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  name        = EXCLUDED.name,
  city        = EXCLUDED.city,
  airport     = EXCLUDED.airport,
  start_date  = EXCLUDED.start_date,
  end_date    = EXCLUDED.end_date,
  flight_date = EXCLUDED.flight_date,
  origin      = EXCLUDED.origin,
  updated_at  = NOW();
